reviews.comment:
Tenía los baños en excelente estado. La máquina para cargar agua caliente era gratis, 3 de las 5 estrellas es por eso.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were in excellent condition. The hot water dispenser was free, which is why it got 3 out of 5 stars.
